pr.title: WIP: Depth Recurrence — val_bpb 3.2134 (beats baseline by 0.014 BPB at 2.8x fewer params)

output.summary: Shared-weight depth recurrence iterates a small transformer bank with iteration embeddings and U-Net skips to achieve 20+ effective layers under 16MB.
techniques: Weight-shared transformer blocks iterated multiple times to boost effective depth
Learned iteration embeddings with sigmoid gating for per-iteration conditioning
U-Net style skip connections adapted for recurrent layers
